# Loupe

Loupe is an open-source, local Windows AI website builder and web-design studio. AI agents build real websites, every AI edit is automatically verified against the real render, and you finish the rest by hand — select, move, resize, edit — on the same live page. Bring your own API keys or the AI subscriptions you already pay for. MIT-licensed.

## Links
- Website: https://tryloupe.app/
- Features: https://tryloupe.app/features.html
- Prompt gallery: https://tryloupe.app/gallery.html
- Download (Windows): https://tryloupe.app/download.html
- FAQ: https://tryloupe.app/faq.html
- Source & README: https://github.com/winchxyz/loupe
- Releases: https://github.com/winchxyz/loupe/releases/latest
- License: MIT (https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)

## Notes
Windows 10/11 (64-bit) desktop app (Electron). Build engines: Claude API, OpenRouter/OpenAI/Gemini/xAI keys, or CLI subscriptions (Claude Code, Codex, Grok, Copilot). Keys stored locally, sent only to the matching provider. Early v0.1, solo-built, maintained in the open.
